nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS num_courses, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.id) AS num_faculty, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_active_boards, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN a.id END) AS num_scripts_in_eval, AVG(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN em.marks_awarded ELSE NULL END) AS avg_eval_marks_per_script
FROM   academic_unit au
JOIN   academic_unit_closure c ON c.ancestor_id = au.id
JOIN   academic_unit course ON course.id = c.descendant_id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.department_id = au.id
JOIN   board b ON b.course_id = au.id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.board_id = b.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
WHERE  au.unit_type = 'COURSE'
GROUP  BY au.name
ORDER  BY num_courses DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Table or alias 'a' is referenced (e.g. in an ON clause or SELECT list) but is not declared in the FROM/JOIN clauses. Add the missing table to the FROM list, or check JOIN ordering — a JOIN's ON clause cannot reference a table that appears later in the JOIN chain.
